Not Submitted

description: Leave unchecked to use Timesheet Settings default.
label: Enable Budget Alerts
name: Project-custom_budget_alerts_enabled

description: Optional JSON array override, e.g. [50, 75, 90, 100, 110].
label: Alert Thresholds (%)
name: Project-custom_budget_alert_thresholds

description: Override global email channel setting for this project.
label: Email Alerts
name: Project-custom_budget_alert_channel_email

description: Override global in-app channel setting for this project.
label: In-App Alerts
name: Project-custom_budget_alert_channel_in_app

description: Override global Slack channel setting for this project.
label: Slack Alerts

description: Override global Teams channel setting for this project.

description: Optional project-specific Microsoft Teams webhook URL.
label: Teams Webhook URL
name: Project-custom_budget_alert_teams_webhook

description: Send burn-to-date, burn rate, and projected finish every week.

description: Includes a shareable client dashboard link in the client email.
label: Email Client Contact
name: Project-custom_weekly_burn_report_client

description: Optional baseline override. Defaults to Estimated Costing.
label: Burn Baseline Amount
name: Project-custom_burn_baseline_amount

description: Optional budget override. Defaults to configured budget limits.
label: Burn Budget Amount
name: Project-custom_burn_budget_amount

description: This will override Standard Working Hours from HR Settings
label: Work schedule
name: Employee-custom_work_schedule

description: Override global under-utilized threshold for this employee. Leave blank to use Timesheet Settings.
label: Under-Utilized Threshold (%)
name: Employee-custom_under_utilized_threshold

description: Override global over-capacity threshold for this employee. Leave blank to use Timesheet Settings.
label: Over-Capacity Threshold (%)
name: Employee-custom_over_capacity_threshold

description: Private token used for read-only assignment calendar (ICS) subscriptions.
label: Allocation Calendar Token
name: Employee-custom_allocation_calendar_token

label: Billing Type
name: Project-custom_billing_type
options:
Non-Billable
Fixed Cost
Retainer
Time and Material

depends_on: eval:doc.custom_billing_type=="Fixed Cost" || doc.custom_billing_type=="Retainer" || doc.custom_billing_type=="Time and Material"
label: Default Hourly Billing Rate
name: Project-custom_default_hourly_billing_rate

depends_on: eval:doc.custom_billing_type=="Time and Material" || doc.custom_billing_type=="Retainer" || doc.custom_billing_type=="Fixed Cost"
label: Project Hours By Contract
name: Project-custom_section_break_ca8jh

name: Project-custom_send_reminder_when_approaching_project_threshold_limit

description: Enable to activate report generation for this project.

name: Project-custom_enable_project_report_generation

description: The Slack channel to get the data for Report generation
label: Slack Channel Slug
name: Project-custom_slack_channel_slug

description: Auto-generated reports for this project
label: Generated Reports
name: Project-custom_project_reports

description: Required when billable status differs from the project default.
label: Billable Override Reason
name: Timesheet Detail-custom_billable_override_reason

description: Show entry descriptions to approvers during the timesheet approval flow.

name: Project-custom_show_description_in_approval
